Default no-op adapter for IAnimator.

Validates the player's answer using an exact string comparison.

Handles the initial setup of the application.

applyTier5Casing(String) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.WordTransformer
Lowercases the word, then randomly uppercases between 1 and 3 characters.
AshFX - Class in com.lulow.justtype.view.particles
Particle emitter that spawns floating ash particles rising from the bottom of the screen.
AshFX(Pane, double, double) - Constructor for class com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.AshFX
Creates and starts the ash emitter on the given pane.
AshParticle - Class in com.lulow.justtype.model.particles
A particle that floats upward and fades out, used for the ash effect in higher difficulty tiers.
AshParticle(double, double, double, double, double, double, Rectangle) - Constructor for class com.lulow.justtype.model.particles.AshParticle
Creates an ash particle.
AudioClips - Class in com.lulow.justtype.model
Constants for all audio file names used in the game.
AudioManager - Class in com.lulow.justtype.model
Singleton manager for playing background music and sound effects.
